subcodes.first_line: The Most Exalted Pen maketh mention of His friends and guideth all unto the straight path on this Day [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قلم اعلی دوستان خود را ذکر مینماید و جمیع را براه راست هدایت میفرماید امروز
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @suffering and imprisonment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @goodly deeds; actions, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
